prompt: A refined conceptual diagram-illustration hybrid for a blog post about layered AI identity. Center: a human avatar or luminous core self. Around it, a ring of six distinct AI agent presences with subtle personality cues. Outside that, a larger organizational ring, and beyond that, several project nodes. The whole composition should communicate nested circles of context and identity boundaries. Clean, elegant, futuristic, editorial, suitable for a high-quality technology blog. Minimal labels or no labels, no busy UI, use visual hierarchy and soft glowing boundaries. Premium digital illustration, restrained color palette, thoughtful and intelligent mood.
